finalized_plan.description: Use the web_search tool to locate and access the German Wikipedia page for "Thieme-Becker" (https://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Thieme-Becker)
Navigate to the section of the page that includes the infobox or main article section where the cover image (frontispiece) is displayed

Identify the image file information, noting the file name and any accompanying details that indicate it is the cover image for “Thieme-Becker – Allgemeines Lexikon der bildenden Künstler von der Antike bis zur Gegenwart.”
Follow the link associated with the image to obtain the Wikimedia Commons page for that file
Confirm the file name and verify that the Wikimedia Commons page corresponds to the frontispiece of the specified multi‐volume work
Construct the correct URL from Wikimedia Commons for the image using the confirmed file name

Prepare the final answer with:
   - A short version of the task outcome.
   - An extremely detailed version including all retrieval and confirmation details.
   - Additional context to provide clear understanding for your manager

root_cause_reasoning: The agent found the target image but made an error when identifying the year.
